channel.title: The Frenchtown Sun
channel.description: Recent content on The Frenchtown Sun

item.title: The Frenchtown Sun -- About Us
item.description:
The Frenchtown Sun is published monthly by the Borough of Frenchtown to provide its residents with local news and community updates.

The content of The Sun is guided by the editorial team of Ted Brandston, Randi Eckel, Rick Epstein, John Gattuso, Jeanne Herb, Amelia Rodriguez and Maria Whelan. John Dougherty serves as the Borough Council liaison.

The first edition of The Frenchtown Sun will be published in April 2026, featuring news from civic and community-based organizations across the borough. The Sun is delivered monthly free of charge to all Frenchtown Borough residents.

item.title: The Frenchtown Sun -- Get a Copy
item.description:
Frenchtown Borough Residents should all recieve a copy in the mail. If you don’t receive a copy or if your copy is addressed incorrectly, you can request a change in three ways:

  • By filling out this form online

  • By emailing your name and address to The Sun at newsletter+address@frenchtownboro.com

  • By sending a note with your name and address by mail to:

     The Frenchtown Sun
 29 Second Street
 Frenchtown, N.J. 08825

For non-residents: The intent is to offer paid subscriptions for people who live outside the Borough of Frenchtown in the near future. Please check back in a few months.
